name: Integra Garments and Textiles Limited
summary: Integra Garments and Textiles Limited does not have significant operations. Previously, it was involved in manufacturing garments in India. The company was formerly known as Five Star Mercantile Limited and changed its name to Integra Garments and Textiles Limited in August 2012. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Mumbai, India. Integra Garments and Textiles Limited is a subsidiary of Ashok Piramal Group Textile Trust.
